allow: PowerShell(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3000 -State Listen -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Select-Object LocalAddress,OwningProcess | ForEach-Object { $p = Get-Process -Id $_.OwningProcess -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; "$\($_.LocalAddress\) PID=$\($_.OwningProcess\) $\($p.ProcessName\)" })

PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Users\\User\\Claudecodedesktop\\foody; Add-Type -AssemblyName System.Drawing; $bmp = New-Object System.Drawing.Bitmap\(720,1080\); $g = [System.Drawing.Graphics]::FromImage\($bmp\); $g.Clear\([System.Drawing.Color]::FromArgb\(217,106,59\)\); $g.FillEllipse\([System.Drawing.Brushes]::Beige, 160, 340, 400, 400\); $g.Dispose\(\); $bmp.Save\("$PWD\\test-food.png", [System.Drawing.Imaging.ImageFormat]::Png\); $bmp.Dispose\(\); "png created"; curl.exe -s -b cookies.txt -F "media=@test-food.png;type=image/png" -F "caption=PNG upload test" -F "state=Johor" -F "city=JB" http://localhost:3000/api/posts)
